claims.missing_email_error: Missing logged-in user email. Please try again.
claims.destination_dialog.title: Where should we add this?
claims.destination_dialog.accounts_empty: You don’t have access to any other accounts yet.
claims.destination_dialog.accounts_error: We couldn’t load your accounts. Try again or pick a new account.
claims.page.no_claim_body: Check that the link you followed is correct, or return to the dashboard.
claims.page.expired_body: This claim link has expired and can no longer be used. Ask the preview owner to generate a new one.
claims.page.not_found_body: This claim link may have been mistyped or already used. Double-check the link or return to the dashboard.
claims.page.already_claimed_body: This preview has already been claimed. Sign in to the owning account, or return to the dashboard.
claims.page.transient_error_body: We couldn’t load the claim details. Try opening the link again, or return to the dashboard.
claims.page.propagation_body: Your site is claimed. We're finishing setting up your account. This usually takes less than a minute and the page will update automatically.
claims.summary.single_named: Claim ownership of %{workerName} and all its resources
claims.summary.single_unnamed: Claim ownership of this Worker and all its resources
claims.summary.multiple: Claim ownership of these %{count} Workers and all their resources
claims.summary.empty: Claim ownership of the preview resources
claims.summary.existing_account_suffix: into a new account or into an existing Cloudflare account.
claims.landing.title: Your site is live
claims.landing.subtitle: Finish setting it up below, or head straight to the overview.
claims.landing.card_domains_description: Register a new domain or bring your own. Free DNS, automatic HTTPS, and DDoS protection included.
claims.landing.card_access_description: Decide who can reach your Worker. Add authentication, set policies, and manage permissions.
claims.landing.card_observability_descri: Enable Observability to get insights into your site's performance and behavior.
claims.landing.card_markdown_description: Make your site easy to explore for agents, showing up more in AI conversations.
claims.landing.markdown_dialog_descripti: Markdown for Agents is a zone-level setting. Add a custom domain to your Worker first, then you can enable it from that domain’s settings.
claims.landing.observability_toggle_erro: Failed to update observability settings. Please try again.
claims.landing.protected_by_access_descr: This site requires authentication and can’t be previewed here. Open it in a new tab to sign in.
